title: Google India Search
subtitle: Enhancing local search for India's diverse linguistic and digital landscape.
problem_statement: Current search interface, despite language options, doesn't fully optimize for India's diverse vernacular and hyper-local information needs.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for local, vernacular search.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry and deep cultural insights.

pillars.title: Cognitive Load
pillars.insight: Navigating English interfaces for local queries is taxing.

pillars.title: Accessibility
pillars.insight: Diverse regional languages need prominent, seamless input methods.

pillars.title: Efficiency
pillars.insight: Slow network and typing local scripts hinder quick searches.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: HMW make vernacular search the default intuitive experience?
HMW help users discover hyper-local content effortlessly?
HMW integrate voice and visual search for local context?

data.name: YouTube
cons: Hard to find specific text info.

points.name: WhatsApp Groups
points.desc: Very local, high access for members.

points.name: Google (Current)
points.desc: Broad, high access, but less hyper-local.

personas.name: Ramesh Kumar
personas.quote: I need quick answers in my language, not complex English.
personas.bio: Runs a small shop, uses smartphone for business, prefers local language content and voice input.

personas.name: Priya Sharma
personas.quote: I want relevant, personalized local recommendations instantly.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy, uses multiple apps, seeks local experiences, values efficiency and personalization.

insights: "Will this work on my slow internet?"
"I wish I could just speak my query."

points.action: Replace static language links with dynamic language selector.
Integrate local community forums directly into search results.
Tailor 'I'm Feeling Lucky' for local cultural events.
Enhance voice search to understand regional accents.

pivot.before: Static language options and generic search results create friction.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from passive language display to active, intelligent vernacular and local content integration.
pivot.after: Dynamic, hyper-local, voice-first search experience for India.

stages.actions: Types query or attempts voice input.
Scans for relevant links and snippets.
Reads content, finds or seeks answer.

annotations.title: Dynamic Language Selector
annotations.rationale: Allows quick, prominent switching between regional languages.

annotations.title: Intelligent Voice Search
annotations.rationale: Microphone icon offers advanced vernacular speech recognition.

annotations.title: Local Context Cards
annotations.rationale: Displays relevant local news, events, or services directly.

data.finding: Clear search bar and brand identity.
Minimal error states on a simple homepage.
Language options are static text, not interactive selectors.
